headline: TE Connectivity announces 10% increase in quarterly cash dividend to $0.78
summary: TE Connectivity plc (NYSE: TEL) announced today that its board of directors declared a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.78 per ordinary share, payable on June 12, 2026, to shareholders of record at the close of business on May 22, 2026. This payment represents a 10% increase from the $0.71 per ordinary share quarterly dividend to be paid on March 13, 2026. In addition, the Company's board of directors authorized a $3.0 billion increase in its share repurchase program.
